title: Ultima Blade
description: Adds an overpowered postgame weapon to goof around with.
body:
Have you ever wanted a goofy sword that will do 100 damage?

Well, that's a bit ridiculous. Or, uh, nevermind. I made one.

Introducing the Ultima Blade, a super-expensive postgame weapon that can one-shot most mobs!

Just don't install this mod on any SMP servers...
